text: AI is transforming the modern workplace in significant ways. One major application is automation, where AI handles repetitive tasks like data entry or scheduling, freeing up employees for more complex work. Productivity tools such as smart email assistants and project management software help workers organize their day and make decisions faster. Importantly, this doesn't mean humans are replaced. Instead, we see human-AI collaboration, where people work alongside AI systems to achieve better results. Of course, these changes also mean some jobs will evolve or disappear, requiring workers to learn new skills and adapt to different roles in a technology-driven environment.
